prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fighting attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use an angular dust shatter burst with sandy fragments, grit shards, and a few short fractured streaks radiating from a compact center. Keep the texture grounded and readable, not smoky or magical. Preserve real impact structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency. Important constraints: no beam, no fire, no lightning filaments, no floating aura symbols, no full-screen debris cloud.
